service_context: Synthetic community-college financial-aid help page with an AI-supported FAQ answer and a human fallback route.
confusing_ai_supported_answer: The chatbot says a student is probably ineligible for aid after a form mismatch, but it does not explain appeal options or documents needed.
human_recourse_path_tested: Called office number listed on aid page
Asked what evidence a student should bring
evidence_preserved: Name/role of human support path, not private student data
List of documents the human office requested
repair_outcome: Human office clarified that the student should not rely on the chatbot answer and should submit a correction form with documentation.
blocked_step: The chatbot answer did not surface the correction form or urgent human-review route.
owner_to_fix: Student support content owner + chatbot workflow owner
next_drill_date: After correction-form link is added and before next registration period
do_not_claim: This is not a service-quality certification
This is not legal, financial-aid, or education-policy advice
Synthetic drill does not prove the live system works under all conditions
boundary_note: Local recourse rehearsal aid only. Use synthetic or consented data. Do not include private student, patient, client, financial, medical, legal, or account records in drill artifacts.
